name: Abodong Pusit (Calamari Stew)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium heat, bring garlic, vinegar, light soy sauce, water, salt, and pepper to a boil.
2. Add the cleaned squid while the mixture is still boiling.
3. Cook for another 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Transfer cooked squid to a serving platter and serve immediately.
5. Remove any transparent cartilage when cleaning the squid.
